trigger_command:
git add -A && git commit -m "Add extractFrame command — extract frames from animated GIF/APNG

Extract a specific frame or all frames from animated GIFs as PNG.
Pure Go for GIF (no external tools). APNG frame 0 via Go stdlib,
other APNG frames via ffmpeg fallback.

Flags: --frame (0-indexed), --all, --output, --json, --quiet.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>" && git push 2>&1 | tail -3
